name: Launchpad
description: Clean, professional aesthetic inspired by fly.io. Navy-violet palette, semi-transparent surfaces, violet-tinted shadows. Gradient accent buttons, transparent nav with violet active states.
personality: rounded + shadow elevation + smooth motion + thin borders + no gradients

decorators.lp-surface: Base surface with subtle texture. Light mode: #FAFAFA, Dark mode: #111111.
decorators.lp-nav: Sticky navigation with blur backdrop. Minimal branding.
decorators.lp-header: Large hero with gradient mesh background.
decorators.lp-card-elevated: Card with elevation shadow, hover lift effect.
decorators.lp-gradient-mesh: Subtle gradient mesh in primary/accent colors at 5% opacity.
decorators.lp-button-primary: Solid primary color button with hover scale.

elevated.description: Clean card with subtle shadow and rounded corners

outlined.description: Card with thin border, no shadow

lp-surface.description: Base surface with subtle texture. Light mode: #FAFAFA, Dark mode: #111111.
lp-surface.intent: Use as the foundational page background. The subtle texture adds depth while maintaining the clean SaaS aesthetic.

lp-nav.description: Sticky navigation with blur backdrop. Minimal branding.
lp-nav.intent: Use for the primary navigation bar. The blur backdrop creates a floating navigation suited for SaaS landing pages.

lp-header.description: Large hero with gradient mesh background.
lp-header.intent: Use for the primary hero section of landing pages. The gradient mesh creates visual depth while keeping the professional tone.

lp-card-elevated.description: Card with elevation shadow, hover lift effect.
lp-card-elevated.intent: Use for feature cards and content containers on landing pages. Shadow elevation and hover lift create professional interactivity.

lp-gradient-mesh.description: Subtle gradient mesh in primary/accent colors at 5% opacity.
lp-gradient-mesh.intent: Use as a background effect for hero and feature sections. The violet-cyan gradient adds brand color without being distracting.

suggested_properties.background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 40%, rgba(124, 58, 237, 0.05), transparent 60%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 60%, rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.05), transparent 60%)

lp-button-primary.description: Solid primary color button with hover scale.
lp-button-primary.intent: Use for primary CTAs on landing pages. Solid color and hover scale create a confident, professional call-to-action.

lp-fade-in.intent: Use as the entrance animation for sections appearing on scroll. Longer duration for a more deliberate, polished reveal.
